purpose: The front-desk worklist / mission-control screen for a radiology center. Receptionists and clinical staff use it to book new appointments (with multi-service visits, referral capture, and duplicate detection), track each visit through the scan-to-delivery pipeline, manage status, print tokens and invoices/receipts, edit or cancel visits, change the referring source, and monitor turnaround-time SLAs. It is offline-first, backed by a local Dexie cache kept fresh by a background sync engine.

features.name: Tab switching (Today / Past / Future)
features.description: Switches the worklist between today's appointments, past (archive) appointments, and future-dated bookings. Intel stat cards adapt per tab.

features.name: Live worklist (offline-first)
features.description: Renders the appointment list reactively from the local cache via liveQuery; a background sync pull is kicked on mount and on every tab/date/status change. Falls back to cached data when the server is unreachable.

features.name: Search filter
features.description: Free-text search matching patient name, mobile, display ID, referrer name, and any service/modality name across all service lines on the visit.

features.name: Modality filter
features.description: Dropdown filtering visits whose any service line matches the chosen modality.

features.name: Specialist (doctor) filter
features.description: Dropdown filtering by assigned lead specialist; options come from the live personnel cache.

features.name: Not-Arrived quick filter
features.description: One-click toggle showing only patients booked but not yet checked in; pulses amber with a live count.

features.name: Reset filters
features.description: Clears search and all filter selections back to defaults.

features.name: Pagination
features.description: Paginates the filtered list at 5 records per page with first/prev/numbered/next/last controls.

features.name: Intel stat cards
features.description: Dashboard cards summarizing total volume, active rate, expected/arrived, scanning/scanned, reporting/finalized, delivered, efficiency/throughput, and cancelled.

features.name: New appointment booking (2-step drawer)
features.description: Multi-step booking: Step 1 captures patient identity + referral source; Step 2 captures modality, service(s), price, date, lead specialist, priority, and notes, then deploys the booking.
features.notes: Auto-registers/syncs patient; inline-creates referrer; optimistic insert then canonical pull; offline outbox with idempotency keys.

features.name: Patient demographics entry
features.description: Captures full name, age with Y/M/D unit toggle, gender, optional mobile, source of information, village, district, and address.

features.name: Live patient duplicate detection
features.description: As the operator types, fuzzy-matches the offline cache and surfaces probable existing patients with confidence tags; 'THIS IS THEM' links them.

features.name: Referrer search & 'did you mean'
features.description: Search-or-type Referred By with live dropdown, top-3 most-frequent referrer quick-add chips, and near-duplicate suggestions.

features.name: Self / walk-in referral
features.description: One-tap button to mark a visit as Self / walk-in (no referral commission).

features.name: Referral source type capture
features.description: Doctor (with speciality/degree/email) or Other person/agent (with mandatory supporting doctor auto-fill).

features.name: Modality + service selection with price autofill
features.description: Modality grid picker, service typeahead auto-filling price and referral cut, 'most used services' chips, matching-services dropdown.

features.name: Quick-add service to catalogue
features.description: Save a typed service (name + price + max referral) to the registry for reuse via smart upsert.

features.name: Multi-service visit tray
features.description: Build a visit with multiple scans: add/edit/remove committed lines with running total and referral-cut tally.

features.name: Appointment date quick-pick
features.description: Quick date chips plus custom date picker.

features.name: Lead specialist assignment
features.description: Card-grid picker to assign the supervising physician; validated against genuine-doctor roster.

features.name: Appointment priority
features.description: STAT / URGENT / ROUTINE selector driving worklist sort and row accent.

features.name: Booking briefing summary
features.description: Final summary listing patient, specialist, date, priority, service lines, total bill, total referral cut.

features.name: Duplicate-appointment pre-check
features.description: Checks cached worklist for same patient+service+date (non-cancelled) and warns; also surfaces server 409.

features.name: Status pipeline action (next-action button)
features.description: Per-row contextual action: Mark Arrived, Deliver.

features.name: Status change (generic)
features.description: Maps CONFIRM/START/COMPLETE/CANCEL/DELIVER to status updates; REPORTING navigates to reporting.
features.notes: May return notAllowed (locked) or requiresApproval (paid cancel).

features.name: Go to reporting
features.description: Routes to /reporting/{appointmentId}.

features.name: View appointment details (read-only modal)
features.description: Full read-only modal: patient, contact, visit, per-service status/price, referral, billing totals, notes; Print token.

features.name: Edit appointment (drawer)
features.description: Full edit drawer for patient, date, modality/service/amount, multi-service tray, specialist, referral, notes.

features.name: Cancel appointment (confirm modal)
features.description: Warns it will delete unpaid invoices, payments, referral commissions; confirming cancels.

features.name: Cancel paid appointment -> admin approval
features.description: When server reports paid appointment can't cancel directly, captures reason and submits CANCEL_APPOINTMENT approval.

features.name: Change referred-by
features.description: Per-row action to correct referrer; applies immediately if unpaid, else captures reason and submits CHANGE_REFERRER approval.

features.name: Print queue token slip
features.description: Silent ESC/POS thermal print when configured + patient arrived, else 80mm preview modal with QR to public tracking.

features.name: Print prescription / report preview
features.description: Per-service print (enabled once finalized) opens ReportPreviewModal scoped to that service.

features.name: Print institutional invoice / receipt / thermal
features.description: Generates A4 tax invoice, A4 receipt, or 80mm thermal receipt, fetching the invoice from finance.

features.name: Service ledger expand/collapse
features.description: Collapsible per-service ledger with modality chip, status pill, stage TAT pill, per-service print.

features.name: Turnaround-time (TAT) tracking pills
features.description: Live on-premises elapsed, scan-to-delivery, and per-stage SLA pills updated on a 60s tick.

features.name: Overdue / priority row highlighting
features.description: Rows pulse red for STAT/overdue (>3h) and amber for URGENT.

features.name: Paid & approval badges
features.description: Green PAID tick from invoices cache; approval-status badge for pending/decided approvals.

features.name: Add patient (standalone drawer)
features.description: Simpler standalone Add New Patient drawer with inline duplicate handling.

features.name: Add referrer modal
features.description: Add a new referrer and auto-select into the current context.

features.name: Mobile/tablet card layout
features.description: On narrow screens renders AppointmentCard components instead of the desktop table.

features.name: Reference data sync
features.description: Loads/live-watches personnel, service registry, referrers, invoices/approval maps from cache.

features.name: Universal notification / error modals
features.description: Themed notification modal, locked-action error modal, and 'sent for approval' confirmation.

dialogs: Cancel paid appointment -> admin approval modal
filters: Past date range with ALL vs RANGE archive mode

purpose: The radiology center's Referral Intelligence command center. Its live render path is the Referral Intel view with five sub-modes (Source Analytics matrix, Case Ledger, Partner Network roster, Master patient index, and Doctor portal share-links), plus partner CRUD, bulk Excel import of partners, commission/payout reporting, intelligence export, doctor-link send (email/WhatsApp), patient edit, and a multi-center hub switcher. Also contains additional render functions (analytics dashboard, staff/user management, hospital config, prescription architect, finance, subscription) that are defined and data-wired but not mounted in the current render path (legacy/dead UI).

features.name: Hub / Center switcher
features.description: Dropdown listing authorized centers; switching calls switchCenter and reloads.

features.name: Referral Intelligence load
features.description: Fetches grouped referral intelligence plus the full referrer roster; offline cache fallback.

features.name: Referral view-mode tabs
features.description: Sub-mode switcher: MATRIX/LOG/ROSTER/PATIENTS/LINKS.

features.name: Referral date/period filter
features.description: SINGLE/RANGE/ALL toggle; re-fetches intelligence/patient lists.

features.name: Person-type filter
features.description: Filter referrers by ALL/DOCTOR/OTHER/SELF.

features.name: Unified module search
features.description: Context-aware search across the active sub-mode.

features.name: Referral sort
features.description: Sort by missions/yield/pending/name asc/desc.

features.name: Source Analytics matrix
features.description: Master/detail referrer roster with per-modality counts, ROI, commission paid/unpaid, expandable detail.

features.name: Self / Walk-in summary card
features.description: Collapses the Self/Walk-in node into its own block, excluded from partner rows.

features.name: Temporal Case-Ledger matrix (LOG)
features.description: Day/week/month/year time-bucketed matrix of referral counts per referrer.

features.name: Export Matrix CSV
features.description: Downloads the temporal referral matrix as CSV.

features.name: Case Ledger row selection + export
features.description: Select case rows and export selected ledger to CSV or share via WhatsApp.

features.name: Partner Network roster (ROSTER)
features.description: Table/cards of every referrer with type/specialty/contact/studies/commission; Edit and Remove.

features.name: Add / Edit partner (referrer)
features.description: Referrer edit drawer with mobile validation, doctor/other type, specialty/degree.

features.name: Delete / remove partner
features.description: Confirm-removes a referrer (history retained).

features.name: Bulk-add partners (Excel)
features.description: Download xlsx template, upload/parse Excel client-side, review, bulk-create partners.

features.name: Export Partner Network roster CSV
features.description: Downloads the full partner roster as CSV.

features.name: Master Patient Index (PATIENTS)
features.description: Lists center-registered patients for the period with search; rows open patient edit.

features.name: Edit patient
features.description: Patient edit drawer (name/mobile/age/gender/village/district/address/sourceOfInfo).

features.name: Doctor Links view (LINKS)
features.description: Per-doctor cards to copy a private dashboard link, send via email/WhatsApp, email-all in bulk.

features.name: Build / copy doctor share link
features.description: Generates a tokenized portal URL (/r/{id}?t=token) and copies to clipboard.

features.name: WhatsApp doctor link
features.description: Generates the share link and opens wa.me with a prefilled message.

features.name: Email doctor link(s)
features.description: Emails the dashboard link to one or many referrers server-side.

features.name: Send-link sheet (capture contact)
features.description: Pick channel, capture/persist missing email/mobile, then deliver.

features.name: Export Intelligence (xlsx)
features.description: Export overlay (all-time or date-range); downloads server xlsx blob.

features.name: Appointment/referral Excel import
features.description: Uploads Excel to import appointments, then refreshes (handler present, trigger unmounted).

features.name: Strategic Outlook / analytics fetch
features.description: Fetches outlook KPIs/modalities/trends/demographics/sources/queues; cached.

features.name: Overview analytics dashboard
features.description: renderAnalytics: timeframe picker, KPI hero, modality intel, peak matrix, TAT analyzer, ROI ledger, A/R, demographics. Defined, not mounted.

features.name: Financial matrix fetch
features.description: Fetches finance performance matrix; cached.

features.name: Service price registry
features.description: Warms price-registry snapshot; save/delete handlers post/delete prices.

features.name: Expense management
features.description: Fetch/create/delete operational expenses.

features.name: Personnel / staff management
features.description: Create/update/delete staff with role assignment, credential copy & WhatsApp share.

features.name: Copy staff credentials
features.description: Copies login ID/security key/hub URL to clipboard.

features.name: WhatsApp staff credentials
features.description: Opens wa.me with formatted credential message.

features.name: Hospital / hub registry & config
features.description: Lists hubs, manage-node view, edit drawer saving compliance metadata. Defined.

features.name: Deploy new chain / center
features.description: Creates a new chain/center then switches to it; offline-queued.

features.name: Toggle auto-billing
features.description: PUTs hospital metadata to enable/disable auto-billing.

features.name: Active center details load
features.description: Loads hospital metadata and seeds billing settings on center change.

features.name: Prescription / Letterhead architect
features.description: Per-doctor letterhead/prescription protocol with live preview, test mode, save. Defined.

features.name: Reporting layout/protocol builder
features.description: Local-only CRUD of report section layouts. Defined, not mounted.

features.name: Subscription view
features.description: Active plan tier, expiry, doctor surcharge ledger; Upgrade navigates to /subscription. Defined.

features.name: Finance Manager component
features.description: FinanceManager imported (commission payout settlement) but not rendered in active return.

features.name: Roles & Permissions component
features.description: RolesAndPermissions imported but not rendered in active return.

features.name: Offline outbox queueing
features.description: Mutations queue to outbox when offline with optimistic UI.

tabs: activeTab (component-level): Referrals | Overview | Staff | Letterhead | Hospitals | Finance
Referral sub-modes: MATRIX | LOG | ROSTER | PATIENTS | LINKS

purpose: The EasyRad admin command center: a tabbed dashboard covering operational/financial/referral analytics (Overview), staff & credential management, roles & permissions, hospital/chain network management, finance (pricing/expenses/billing), and report letterhead/prescription branding. The tab set is module-gated: Cloud PACS-only centres see just Staff + Letterhead, while RIS/RIS+PACS see the full set.

features.name: Module-gated tab navigation
features.description: Renders all tabs for RIS/RIS+PACS, only Staff+Letterhead for PACS-only; auto-redirects off hidden tabs.

features.name: Register New Chain CTA
features.description: Hero button opening the chain-deployment drawer.

features.name: Overview timeframe controller
features.description: Day/Week/Month/Year/All control recomputing range and re-fetching outlook/matrix/referrals.

features.name: Strategic Outlook / tactical KPI fetch
features.description: Loads outlook data (kpis, modalities, volumeTrends, demographics, topSources, pendingQueues); cached.

features.name: Hero KPI nodes
features.description: KPI cards: Universal Registry, Live Volume + growth %, Financial Yield, Command Latency.

features.name: Regional Source Outlook strip
features.description: Top referring sources for the logged date as ranked chips.

features.name: Clinical Modality Intel
features.description: Donut + per-modality counts breakdown.

features.name: Operational Peak Matrix
features.description: Daily volume bar chart highlighting peak days.

features.name: Clinical TAT Flow & Bottleneck Analyzer
features.description: Scan-to-draft, draft-to-sign, avg TAT, longest queue, peak hour, bottleneck risk index, pending queues by modality.

features.name: Physician Referral Yield & Commissions Ledger
features.description: Net margin, unpaid liabilities, gross yield, paid/unpaid commissions, top-3 ROI leaderboard, unpaid liability by modality.

features.name: A/R Realization & Collections Analytics
features.description: A/R realization index, billed gross, realized cash, outstanding, bad-debt ratio, aging buckets, collection-channel breakdown.

features.name: Modality Net Operating Margin & Equipment ROI
features.description: Per-modality revenue vs cost, net margin, equipment ROI, break-even scans, advisory.

features.name: Patient Lifetime Value (LTV) & Cohort Retention
features.description: AOV, frequency, projected LTV, economic segmentation, churn watchlist, cohort retention heatmap.

features.name: Demographics matrix
features.description: Gender matrix and age stratification bars.

features.name: Export Intelligence (Excel)
features.description: Downloads an .xlsx intelligence report (date range or all-time).

features.name: Staff / Personnel roster
features.description: Paginated personnel table (5/page) from local snapshot; searchable; role badge, status, last login, masked password.

features.name: Reveal/hide staff password
features.description: Per-row toggle revealing the stored password.

features.name: Register / edit personnel
features.description: 2-step wizard drawer; new doctor seats prompt a surcharge confirm (skipped for PACS-only).

features.name: Revoke / delete personnel
features.description: Confirmation modal; blocks revoking your own account.

features.name: Copy credentials
features.description: Copies login ID + security key + hub URL to clipboard.

features.name: WhatsApp share credentials
features.description: Opens wa.me with formatted credentials message.

features.name: Edit-permission gating
features.description: Action buttons shown only when admindoctor, or admin editing a non-superuser.

features.name: Roles & Permissions
features.description: Delegates to RolesAndPermissions component; custom roles via getCustomRoles(centerId).

features.name: Hospital Board / network list
features.description: Lists mapped hospitals (merged with authorized centers) with Manage action; offline fallback.

features.name: View / manage hospital details
features.description: Detail view (GSTIN, registration, PAN, NABH) and administrator card.

features.name: Edit hospital configuration
features.description: Drawer to update hospital metadata.

features.name: Edit admin clinical credentials
features.description: Inline edit of admin specialization, degree, license.

features.name: Deploy new chain / hospital node
features.description: Creates a new chain/hospital then switches into it.

features.name: Switch active centre/node
features.description: Switches active centre and clears local data to force re-sync.

features.name: Active centre details auto-load
features.description: Loads hospital metadata and seeds auto-billing on center change.

features.name: Toggle auto-billing
features.description: Enables/disables auto-billing for the active hospital.

features.name: Finance Manager
features.description: Delegates the Finance tab to FinanceManager (prices, matrix, expenses, billing settings).

features.name: Service price registry
features.description: Warms the registry snapshot; renders reactively.

features.name: Add / edit service price
features.description: Saves a service charge; auto-generates a default reporting template for brand-new services.

features.name: Delete service price
features.description: Deletes a service charge with confirm.

features.name: Add expense
features.description: Records an operational expense; refreshes matrix + list.

features.name: Delete expense
features.description: Deletes an expense with confirm; refreshes matrix.

features.name: List expenses
features.description: Loads expense ledger with offline fallback.

features.name: Letterhead / Prescription Architect
features.description: Centre-wide report letterhead & prescription protocol editor with live preview and test mode.

features.name: Referral Intelligence engine (defined, not wired into visible tabs)
features.description: renderReferralIntel builds a full referral dashboard; data fetches still power the Overview referral module.

features.name: Patient master list fetch
features.description: Loads patient registry (all-time or date-range) for the referral patients view.

features.name: Edit referrer / partner
features.description: Create or update a referring partner (mobile validated).

features.name: Delete referrer / partner
features.description: Removes a partner with confirm (history retained).

features.name: Edit patient
features.description: Updates patient demographics.

features.name: Import appointments/referrals (file upload)
features.description: Uploads a file to bulk-import appointments; refreshes intelligence and master.

features.name: Export referral case ledger (CSV / WhatsApp)
features.description: Exports selected referral case rows as CSV or a WhatsApp message.

features.name: Export referral matrix (CSV)
features.description: Exports the temporal referral matrix as CSV.

features.name: Export partner network roster (CSV)
features.description: Exports the partner roster as CSV.

features.name: Layout / reporting protocol builder
features.description: Local-only builder for report section layouts.

features.name: Offline outbox integration
features.description: Most mutations fall back to addToOutbox on genuine network errors.

dialogs: Register new chain / deploy node drawer

purpose: The radiologist's diagnostic workspace for a single appointment (or cloud PACS study). Combines an advanced DICOM viewer, a rich-text narrative report editor with templates/keywords/voice/AI assist, electronic sign-off, autosave with crash recovery and offline support, Word round-trip, print/export, and a patient timeline with prior-study copy-forward.

features.name: Context loading by appointment
features.description: Loads patient/case context for ?id with online-first + offline-cache fallback, retrying live fetch up to 3 times; resolves reporting doctor from appointment, stored user, then JWT.

features.name: Context loading by cloud PACS study
features.description: Separate loader for ?studyId with no appointment/timeline; synthesizes patient header from study demographics.

features.name: Multi-service report scoping
features.description: Service-picker tab strip scopes load/save/voice/print to ?serviceId; defaults to first unreported service.

features.name: Auto template matching
features.description: Auto-matches a report template against the active service name (exact/token-set/substring) and applies its HTML.

features.name: Template picker / apply
features.description: SearchableTemplatePicker selects and applies template HTML.

features.name: Keyword/macro library
features.description: Loads a shorthand-macro library for editor autocomplete.

features.name: Institutional branding protocol
features.description: Loads the doctor's branding (margins, font, letterhead) for the editor page model and Word export.

features.name: Rich-text narrative report editor
features.description: Tiptap NarrativeEditor with formatting, tables, images, page margins/font, watermark, patient header banner.

features.name: Editable vs locked patient header
features.description: Locked auto-filled banner with Edit to inject editable header content; choice persisted per-report.

features.name: Local + cloud autosave (OCC)
features.description: Debounced local-draft + cloud autosave with optimistic-concurrency tokens and offline outbox queueing.

features.name: Manual save
features.description: Save button and Ctrl+S.

features.name: 409 conflict / undo
features.description: On OCC 409 conflict, offers to push the server version into the editor.

features.name: Crash / draft recovery
features.description: Compares local draft to server findings and prompts DraftRecoveryModal to restore.

features.name: Electronic sign-off / finalize (21 CFR Part 11)
features.description: Finalize via FinalizeDialog (password re-auth); locks editor, navigates to /doctor-board. Ctrl+Shift+S.

features.name: Addendum
features.description: Add an immutable addendum to a finalized report.

features.name: Voice reporting -> AI draft
features.description: VoiceReportingPanel captures dictation; generateVoiceReport sends transcript+template+context to backend for a structured HTML report.
features.notes: VOICE tab currently hidden but panel/handler retained.

features.name: AI assist (selection) + whole-report cleanup
features.description: handleAiAssist on a selection, runRadAiCleanup whole-report, acceptAiReview to apply edits.

features.name: Prior-study copy-forward
features.description: Copies a prior report's findings into the current report with an auto comparison line.

features.name: Patient timeline
features.description: Fetches/renders prior studies in the TIMELINE tab; opens a historical study in the DICOM viewer.

features.name: Restore current study
features.description: Restores the active case's original assets after viewing a historical study.

features.name: DICOM viewer (AdvancedDicomViewer)
features.description: Cornerstone viewer: W/L, zoom, pan, stack scroll, measurements, ROI tools, arrow, magnify, invert/flip/rotate, cine, layouts, series/slice nav, metadata overlay.

features.name: DICOM keyboard shortcuts + help
features.description: Global keydown maps tools, cine, key image, sync, arrows, layouts, reset, help modal.

features.name: Key images
features.description: toggleKeyImage marks/unmarks current series+slice (K).

features.name: Viewport sync
features.description: Toggle synchronized scrolling (V).

features.name: On-demand DICOM hydration / streaming download
features.description: Defers ZIP download until DICOM tab opens; streams Azure ZIP, decodes while downloading, IndexedDB cache, proxy fallback on CORS.

features.name: File upload (ZIP / DICOM)
features.description: Upload a ZIP of DICOM or a single .dcm; adds to local series and persists.
features.notes: Primary path is direct browser->Azure SAS; multipart POST is fallback.

features.name: Live background polling
features.description: Every 5s while online and not finalized, polls appointment status/notes and the manifest for new series.

features.name: Open in Microsoft Word (round-trip)
features.description: Desktop: launches Word and imports findings back on save; Web: downloads a .docx.

features.name: Print / preview
features.description: Opens ReportPreviewModal with auto-flow page-break markers for printing/export.

features.name: Editor layout engine
features.description: Resizable/collapsible editor panel via drag and Ctrl shortcuts; responsive tablet/mobile.

features.name: Fullscreen + overlay portaling
features.description: Portals notifications inside the fullscreen host.

features.name: Offline support
features.description: Cached appointment/report fallbacks, offline draft reconstitution, outbox queueing.

features.name: Measurement capture hook
features.description: Logs clinical measurements recorded in the viewer.

purpose: A central configuration hub for the current facility, grouping settings into tabs: report templates/macros and per-machine printing/device settings. It is a thin shell that delegates to ReportingRegistry and ThermalPrinterSettings components.

features.name: Tabbed settings navigation
features.description: Two-tab switcher (Report Templates, Printing & Devices).

features.name: Report templates & macros management
features.description: Renders ReportingRegistry scoped to active center and current user; template/keyword CRUD delegated there.

features.name: Printing & devices settings
features.description: Renders ThermalPrinterSettings for this machine's thermal printer.

features.name: Facility context binding
features.description: Binds settings to activeCenter and currentUser via useAuth.

purpose: Master Staff & Payroll management page. Tabbed shell (Dashboard / Roster / Leave Policy) where Roster shows a searchable staff list plus a 5-tab detail panel (Profile, Documents, Salary, Attendance, Leave), with full CRUD, photo upload, revision-aware salary structures, attendance-aware payroll disbursement, payslip printing, leave application/approval and document management.

features.name: Load personnel roster
features.description: Fetches all staff, maps DTO, caches; falls back to cache.

features.name: Load attendance for month
features.description: Fetches attendance rows for the active month, reshapes, caches.

features.name: Load leave requests
features.description: Fetches all leave requests, maps, caches.

features.name: Load leave policy
features.description: Loads hospital leave policy, parses types, caches per-center.

features.name: Load salary (per staff)
features.description: Fetches revisions + disbursements when a staff is selected.

features.name: Load staff documents
features.description: Lazy-loads documents when Documents tab opened.

features.name: Add staff
features.description: Posts a new staff record; handles USER_LIMIT_REACHED plan error.

features.name: Edit staff
features.description: Updates a record via PUT.

features.name: Delete / deactivate staff
features.description: Confirm then deactivate (history preserved).

features.name: Toggle staff role
features.description: Adds/removes a role and PUTs (legacy: access tab removed).

features.name: Upload staff photo
features.description: Validates image <=5MB, uploads multipart, updates photoUrl.

features.name: Remove staff photo
features.description: Deletes profile photo.

features.name: Upload document
features.description: Drag-drop/click upload (<=10MB) with category, then refetch list.

features.name: Download / open document
features.description: Opens blobUrl in new tab.

features.name: Delete document
features.description: Confirm then delete document.

features.name: Create salary revision
features.description: Validates effectiveFrom, POSTs new revision, reloads salary.

features.name: Delete salary revision
features.description: Confirm then delete a revision.

features.name: Compute monthly payroll
features.description: Pure calc honoring mid-month revisions, attendance, leave consumption, LWP, pro-rated net.

features.name: Disburse salary
features.description: Computes payroll, validates reference/encashment, POSTs; supports Draft, Pay now, Pay & print.

features.name: Change disbursement status
features.description: Toggles a disbursement Draft<->Paid.

features.name: Delete draft disbursement
features.description: Confirm then delete a Draft disbursement.

features.name: Print payslip
features.description: Generates a styled HTML payslip in a popup and auto-prints.

features.name: Leave encashment during payout
features.description: Encash N days of a leave type for cash in the disbursement drawer.

features.name: Extra pay / bonus
features.description: Add an arbitrary extra pay amount + reason.

features.name: Mark attendance
features.description: Calendar day/Mark today; optimistic update then PUT; offline-tolerant.

features.name: Attendance summary / coverage
features.description: Calendar + present rate %, marked vs expected, per-status bars.

features.name: Apply leave
features.description: Validates dates/balance, optimistic pending entry, POSTs.

features.name: Approve / reject leave
features.description: Optimistic status set then PATCH (skips API for temp ids).

features.name: Leave balance display
features.description: Per-type balance cards (used vs annual quota).

features.name: Profile completeness
features.description: Groups fields, computes % complete, banner; empty fields open edit.

features.name: Auto-select first staff
features.description: On desktop, auto-selects the first roster member.

features.name: Search roster
features.description: Filters by name or email.

features.name: Refresh all
features.description: Re-runs personnel + local data + leave policy.

features.name: Leave Policy editor
features.description: Embeds LeavePolicyEditor (API calls inside that component).

features.name: Embedded Dashboard
features.description: Embeds StaffDashboardPage with onSelectStaff to open Roster detail.

features.name: Notification / confirm modal
features.description: Unified modal for toasts and danger confirmations.

tabs: Detail: Profile, Documents, Salary, Attendance, Leave

purpose: Workforce/payroll overview dashboard. KPI cards (total staff, paid this month, awaiting payment with amount due, active leave policy) and a per-staff payroll table for a selectable month, computing attendance days, leave YTD, extra LWP, structure net, pro-rated payable (with leave-encashment bonus) and disbursement status. Renders standalone or embedded in StaffPage.

features.name: Load all dashboard data
features.description: Parallel-loads staff, leave policy, cached attendance/leave, then fan-out fetches each staff's salary.

features.name: Refresh
features.description: Hero Refresh re-runs loadAll.

features.name: Per-staff monthly payroll computation
features.description: Computes active revision, gross/net, attendance, leave consumption, LWP, encashment bonus, pro-rated net, status.

features.name: Leave balance per staff
features.description: Used vs quota per leave type and remaining for the year.

features.name: KPI summary
features.description: Total staff, count paid, count awaiting, total due, total disbursed, leave-policy size.

features.name: Search staff
features.description: Filters table rows by name or email.

features.name: Month selector
features.description: Stepper + 24-month dropdown + Reset to current.

features.name: Open staff
features.description: Row click calls onSelectStaff (embedded) or navigates to /staff.

features.name: Manage Staff navigation
features.description: Hero button navigates to /staff (standalone only).

features.name: Payroll status display
features.description: Per-row badge NO STRUCTURE / PAID / DRAFT / PENDING with amounts; responsive cards/grid.

features.name: Responsive layout
features.description: Switches desktop grid vs mobile cards (<=768px).

purpose: Offline-first clinical operations command center. Renders a date-scoped worklist of appointments (with per-AppointmentService line items) and lets front-desk/ops staff drive manual status transitions, track per-stage TAT/SLA, leave visit and per-service notes, view comment timelines, and export the worklist to Excel. Reads from a local Dexie cache via liveQuery and writes through to the API (or an offline outbox).

features.name: Offline-first worklist via liveQuery
features.description: Subscribes to watchAppointments({mode:'all'}); renders from cache, auto-updates on sync deltas, works offline.

features.name: Manual sync / Refresh
features.description: syncNow() forces an immediate sync; no-op offline.

features.name: Date navigator
features.description: Prev/Next day, date input, TODAY reset; filters client-side.

features.name: Search filter
features.description: Search across patientName, displayId, mobile, service names.

features.name: Modality filter
features.description: Dropdown derived from service-line data; matches any line.

features.name: Service status filter

features.name: List vs Modality-Queue view toggle
features.description: Per-appointment ledger vs per-room modality-pivoted queue.

features.name: KPI intel cards
features.description: Per-service-line metrics for the date: Total, Not Started, Scanned, Reported, Delivered.

features.name: Per-service status advance
features.description: Optimistic patch + parent rollup, then PATCH; arrival-gated; offline outbox.

features.name: Per-service notes edit

features.name: Service pill popover (status + notes editor)
features.description: 6-step status grid + cancel + 500-char notes; diffs draft and fires status/notes PATCH in parallel.

features.name: Add visit note
features.description: Appends a visit-level comment; mirrors onto delayReason; quick-fill chips; offline outbox.

features.name: Comment timeline popup
features.description: Lazily fetches full comment history newest-first.

features.name: Excel export (3 sheets)
features.description: Bulk-fetches comments then builds Operations/Services/Comments sheets with TAT.

features.name: Per-stage TAT / SLA chips

features.name: Visit-level TAT pills
features.description: On-premises elapsed and Scan->Delivered pills, live counting.

features.name: Status pills & stage badges
features.description: Clinical-stage badges and per-line step pills with rollup caption.

features.name: Expandable per-service ledger
features.description: Expands multi-service visits into a detailed editor table.

features.name: Modality Queue view
features.description: Pivots non-cancelled lines into per-modality columns with context-aware action buttons (arrival-gated).

features.name: Pagination

features.name: Responsive layouts
features.description: Phone cards / tablet 2-up / desktop card-stack.

features.name: Local toasts

features.name: Offline outbox queueing
features.description: Status/notes/comment writes queue under SERVICE_STATUS/SERVICE_NOTES/APPOINTMENT_COMMENT.

purpose: A Cornerstone3D-based DICOM diagnostic workstation. Initializes the Cornerstone engine, renders MPR (axial/sagittal/coronal) and 3D volume viewports with synchronized cameras and window-level, provides a measurement toolbelt, and an in-viewer clinical reporting sidebar. All data is currently hardcoded/local; there are no backend API calls.

features.name: Cornerstone engine init
features.description: Awaits core+tools init, wires wado image-loader, sets up RenderingEngine and tool group; destroys engine on unmount.

features.name: Viewport matrix (MPR + 3D)
features.description: Sets axial/sagittal/coronal orthographic + VOLUME_3D MIP viewports with camera and VOI synchronizers.

features.name: Layout switch (MPR / 3D)
features.description: Toggles 2x2 MPR grid vs single 3D.

features.name: Series navigator
features.description: Sidebar series tiles set activeSeries (hardcoded list).

features.name: Tool switching
features.description: Window/Level, Crosshairs, Length, Elliptical ROI.

features.name: Clinical reporter sidebar
features.description: Findings + Impression textareas bound to report state.

features.name: Mark key image
features.description: Appends a key-image tag; rendered as thumbnails.

features.name: Authorize export
features.description: Shows an info toast; save button unwired (stub, no API).

purpose: The central Finance hub: an offline-first (Dexie liveQuery) dashboard with five tabs (Revenue, Expenses, Referrals, Analytics, Control) that handles invoice creation/payment collection/discounts, the service-charge price registry, operational & referral expenses, referral commission payouts, KPI stats and analytics matrix, Excel export, A4/thermal/receipt printing, and routing sensitive post-payment changes to admin approval.

features.name: Tabbed finance views
features.description: Switch between Revenue, Expenses, Referrals, Analytics, Control.

features.name: Offline-first invoice list (liveQuery)
features.description: Invoices render from local cache; fetchInvoices is a SyncEngine nudge.

features.name: Fetch finance stats
features.description: Loads headline KPIs; caches and falls back.

features.name: Client-side computed analytics override
features.description: When offline or outbox pending, computes stats+matrix locally; shows banner.

features.name: Fetch finance matrix
features.description: Loads daily/weekly/monthly/yearly/modality breakdown.

features.name: Service charge price registry (snapshot)

features.name: Save/edit service price

features.name: Delete service price
features.description: Confirms then deletes a registry entry.

features.name: Edit recorded payout -> approval

features.name: Toggle commission paid status
features.description: Flips a commission PAID/UNPAID via PATCH.

features.name: Write off referrer deficit
features.description: Absorbs a referrer's net-negative balance via an offsetting WRITE-OFF commission.

features.name: Upcoming referral cuts projection
features.description: Projects optimistic UNPAID commissions from future appointments.

features.description: Creates/updates an operational or referral expense; idempotency + outbox.

features.description: Toggles an expense PAID/UNPAID.

features.description: Sets any status from the ledger dropdown.

features.name: Delete expense

features.name: Fetch personnel / derive owner

features.name: Patient search (debounced)

features.name: Approval map lookup

purpose: The admin/admin-doctor sign-off queue for sensitive post-payment money changes (edit payment, cancel paid appointment, change referrer, free test, revert paid commission). Lists pending requests for decision and a searchable/filterable history, letting an admin Approve (change applied) or Reject (with reason).

purpose: Radiology technician scanning worklist plus a full DICOM acquisition workspace. Lists today's studies (offline-first via Dexie liveQuery), lets the tech update per-visit and per-service scan status, upload DICOM/ZIP study assets to Azure, and view/annotate series in an embedded advanced DICOM viewer before marking studies scanned.

purpose: Full-screen professional DICOM viewer wrapping the AdvancedDicomViewer (Cornerstone) engine. Loads studies via router state or by hydrating a manifest via appointmentId/studyId URL params, supports multi-series navigation, a large diagnostic toolset, layouts, keyboard shortcuts, and live backend extraction progress.

purpose: Operator dashboard for the local NexEagle DICOM Bridge service (Orthanc -> 1Rad upload pipeline). Monitors a locally-running bridge over http://localhost:3001, shows upload activity, lets operators configure auto/manual upload + modality filters, and provides step-by-step bridge and Modality Worklist (MWL) setup guides. The 1Rad backend is NOT called directly here; all data comes from the local bridge.

features.name: Bridge connection status polling

purpose: Public, login-free viewer for a study shared via a signed 24-hour token link (/share/:token). No auth - access is gated entirely by the token. Fetches a shared manifest, builds series, and renders them in the AdvancedDicomViewer with branded loading/expired/invalid/error states.

features.description: Brand + patient name, modality, secure-24h note.

purpose: Cloud PACS-only worklist plus Upload Center. Lets staff drag/drop or pick ZIP/DICOM to register appointment-free imaging studies, browse/filter/sort every study for the centre, triage an Inbox of unmatched studies, assign them to patients/appointments, and view/report/share/export/delete studies. PACS-gated route at /studies.

features.name: Drag-and-drop / click upload (Upload Center)
features.description: Each file registers an appointment-free ImagingStudy then SAS-uploads the asset; backend runs extraction + matching.

features.name: Per-upload progress tracking
features.description: Live per-file row with stage and percent.

features.name: Worklist table
features.description: Lists studies (patient, modality, date, accession, size, status, report/link status, actions).

features.name: All studies / Inbox tabs
features.description: Toggle every study vs unassigned subset; Inbox carries a live count badge.

features.name: Inbox badge count
features.description: Lightweight count query for the Inbox badge.

features.name: Search filter
features.description: Search by patient name / MRN / accession.

features.name: Modality filter
features.description: Filter by modality.

features.name: Date filter (All / Today / Range)
features.description: All / today / custom from-to range.

features.name: Column sorting
features.description: Toggle asc/desc per column.

features.name: Pagination
features.description: Numbered pages + prev/next, 10/page.

features.name: Manual refresh
features.description: Re-runs the studies query.

features.name: Auto-poll while processing
features.description: Silently re-fetches every 4s while any study extracts.

features.name: Live extraction status pill
features.description: Ready/Failed/processing with phase, percent, slice count; error inline.

features.name: Report status pill
features.description: Finalized / Draft / No report.

features.name: Link/match status pill
features.description: Unassigned or Visit/Patient with auto tag.

features.name: View study (viewer + reporting)
features.description: Opens /reporting?studyId=...&view=dicom in a new tab; disabled unless Ready.

features.name: Retry / re-extract
features.description: Restarts server-side processing for failed studies.

features.name: Assign study
features.description: Inbox studies opened in Assign modal to link to a patient or appointment.

features.name: Assign - patient search
features.description: Debounced patient search, top 20.

features.name: Assign - appointment search
features.description: Debounced appointment search, top 20.

features.name: Secure 24h share link
features.description: Creates a share token, builds /share/{token}, copy + native share; expires 24h.

features.name: Export study files
features.description: Fetches export manifest then staggered per-file downloads.

features.name: Delete study
features.description: Permanently deletes the study + files (non-appointment-linked only).

features.name: Centre storage usage meter
features.description: Shows used vs quota (red >90%).

features.name: Toast notifications
features.description: Transient success/error toast for actions.

dialogs: Assign study modal (To patient / To appointment)

purpose: Per-patient diagnostic history timeline opened from the reporting workspace. Shows every past visit for a patient (other than the current appointment) as vertical timeline cards with status/modality/service breakdown, stats, filtering, read-only report viewing, and DICOM opening.

features.name: Fetch patient timeline
features.description: Queries the timeline API for a GUID patientId; else merges live + archive appointment searches deduped.

features.name: Refresh history
features.description: Re-runs the timeline fetch.

features.name: Patient profile header
features.description: Hero with name, UHID, age, gender, modality, study chips.

features.name: Summary stats
features.description: Total Studies, Finalized, distinct Modalities, Latest visit date.

features.name: Status filter
features.description: Filters cards by distinct statuses.

features.name: Modality filter
features.description: Filters by any modality across multi-service lines.

features.name: Timeline cards
features.description: Per-visit cards with services, progress badge, date, doctor, referral, status, notes.

features.name: View report (read-only)
features.description: Opens SavedReportViewer for visits with a report (fetches its own data).

features.name: Open DICOM
features.description: Fetches study assets and navigates to /dicom-viewer with series + context.

features.name: Back to report
features.description: Navigates to returnPath (default /reporting/{id}).

purpose: Anonymous public /track/:id status tracker reached by scanning a QR carrying a signed ?token=. Shows a patient-safe live visit progress timeline (booked->arrived->scanning->acquired->analyzing->finalized) and, once a report is finalized, renders the branded printable/shareable final report. No login, no sensitive data.

features.name: Fetch tracking data
features.description: Single public call returns tracker-safe appointment, finalized report, and doctor branding. Token as query param.

features.name: Auto-refresh polling
features.description: Re-fetches every 30s for live status.

features.name: Invalid/expired link state
features.description: 401 shows a locked invalid/expired screen.

features.name: Live progress timeline
features.description: 6-step timeline with real timestamps and current-step pulse.

features.name: Booking-slip / patient info card
features.description: Token, ID, name, date, modality, study; multi-service chips + per-service status.

features.name: Time-on-premises clock
features.description: Live elapsed time since arrival.

features.name: Current status banner + footer messages
features.description: Pinned live status card plus per-stage footer copy.

features.name: Tracker expiry rule
features.description: Live tracker expires at IST midnight; finalized reports never expire.

features.name: Finalized report view
features.description: Branded A4 report with letterhead (via Azure proxy), findings/impression/advice.

features.name: Save as PDF / Print
features.description: window.print() with print CSS.

features.name: Share report
features.description: Native share or WhatsApp fallback.

purpose: Full-screen waiting-room display board showing today's active appointment queue (token, patient name, modality/service, status). Reads from the local offline cache via liveQuery kept fresh by the background sync engine - no polling.

features.name: Live today's-queue subscription
features.description: Subscribes to watchAppointments({mode:'today'}); filters active statuses, sorts by time, updates instantly.

features.name: Initial cache warm / sync
features.description: Calls syncNow() on mount; sync engine refreshes in background.

features.name: Live clock
features.description: Header shows current time (1s tick) and date.

features.name: Queue rows
features.description: Animated rows (#token, patient, modality//service, colored status badge).

features.name: Empty state
features.description: 'NO ACTIVE MISSIONS IN QUEUE' when empty.

apiEndpointsUsed: (no direct HTTP) watchAppointments liveQuery on local cache

purpose: Public /r/:id dashboard for a referring doctor, opened via a signed capability token in ?t=. No login. Shows the doctor's referred patients (masked identities), study status, and eligible/paid/outstanding referral amounts, plus a gamified 'upcoming optimistic cuts' panel for future-dated referrals, date filtering, and a self-service profile editor.

features.name: 3-second branded splash
features.description: Animated centre-logo splash for 3s on entry.

features.name: Fetch referral dashboard
features.description: Loads the doctor's referral payload (doctor/centre info, patients with status/amounts). Token as query param.

features.name: Link unavailable state
features.description: Locked screen on missing/expired token.

features.name: Present vs future split
features.description: Splits referrals into earned (table) vs upcoming/optimistic (gamified).

features.name: Date range filter
features.description: Today / 7 days / This month / All / Custom.

features.name: Quick-glance stats
features.description: Referred count, Eligible total, Received, Outstanding.

features.name: Personalised thank-you
features.description: Thank-you banner with today's count + eligible amount.

features.name: Gamified upcoming cuts
features.description: Optimistic earnings panel with locked per-patient cards unlocking on service date.

features.name: Referred-patients table
features.description: Date, masked patient, study/modality, status, eligible/paid/unpaid; 5/page.

features.name: Pagination
features.description: Prev/Next, 5 rows/page.

features.name: Profile editor
features.description: Edit name/mobile/email/location/degree/specialty; saves and optimistically updates.

features.name: Centre header / contact
features.description: Sticky header with logo, name, location, admin tel/mailto links.

purpose: Primary sign-in screen with three auth modes (password, OTP/SMS, offline quick-unlock PIN), session-revocation banners, offline-readiness highlight, post-login PIN-setup prompt, and rotating industry-quote marketing panel.

features.name: Password login
features.description: Email/mobile + password; success offers PIN setup then redirects by role; failure opens AuthErrorModal.

features.name: OTP / SMS code login
features.description: Request OTP (30s resend), then verify; unregistered verified user routes to /register.

features.name: Quick-Unlock PIN login (offline)
features.description: Detects saved-PIN profiles; 4-digit PIN verified locally; restores AuthContext from cache; lockout handling.
features.notes: Local IndexedDB auth, no server call.

features.name: Post-login PIN setup prompt
features.description: PinSetupModal to enroll a 4-digit PIN if none and not dismissed.

features.name: Session-revocation banner
features.description: Reads ?reason= and explains why a prior session ended.

features.name: Show/hide password toggle
features.description: Eye button toggles password visibility.

features.name: Live offline/online indicator
features.description: Swaps the 'Works fully offline' card on connectivity change.

features.name: Rotating industry quotes
features.description: Auto-cycling marketing cards (6s) with progress dots.

features.name: Inline USER_NOT_FOUND / register CTA
features.description: On unknown identity, inline error + register modal carrying the identifier.

features.name: Forgot-password / register links
features.description: Links to /forgot-password and /register.

purpose: Multi-step centre onboarding/registration wizard (mobile OTP verify, identity, clinical credentials, centre details, plan selection) with gamified per-step achievement rewards and a welcome-celebration overlay; provisions the AdminDoctor account.

features.name: Account type selection
features.description: Chief Medical Officer (admindoctor) or Operations Director (admin); admin skips clinical step.

features.name: Mobile OTP verification (step 1)
features.description: Send OTP (30s resend) then verify; already-registered routes to /login.

features.name: Identity details (step 2)
features.description: Name, email, password (min 6) + confirm with match check.

features.name: Clinical credentials (step 3)
features.description: Specialization, reg no., degree (admindoctor only).

features.name: Centre details (step 4)
features.description: Centre name, chain, GSTIN (validated), reg no, PAN (validated), NABH, address.

features.name: Plan/package selection (step 5)
features.description: Pick SKU (RIS+PACS/RIS/PACS) with Monthly/Yearly; 'from' price from public plans; 14-day trial.

features.name: Submit registration
features.description: Posts full registration payload via registerAdminDoctor; success opens WelcomeCelebration; identity clash handled.

features.name: Per-step achievement reward
features.description: Non-blocking StepReward overlay auto-dismissed ~2.2s.

features.name: Welcome celebration overlay
features.description: Confetti success card; auto-redirects to /login in 8s.

features.name: Identity-clash recovery
features.description: Modal offers Sign in / Forgot password / different email-mobile.

purpose: Three-phase password recovery flow (identify by email/mobile, verify decryption code, set new password) with masked destination display and a success overlay.

features.name: Identify account (step 1)
features.description: Submit email/mobile to trigger reset-code dispatch (vague response to prevent enumeration).

features.name: Masked destination hint
features.description: Client-side masked target (email/mobile) without trusting server.

features.name: Verify reset code (step 2)
features.description: 6-digit code with resend countdown; verifies code.

features.name: Reset password (step 3)
features.description: New password + confirm (match); success shows ACCESS RESTORED.

features.name: Success overlay
features.description: Confirmation with CTA to /login.

features.name: Return to login link
features.description: Link back to /login.

purpose: 403 fallback page shown when a user lacks permission for a route; offers a clean return to login and, only if a reachable home exists, a 'Go to My Dashboard' button.

features.name: Back to Login
features.description: Logs out (best-effort) then navigates to /login.

features.name: Go to My Dashboard
features.description: Computes a reachable home from ROLE_HOME or first permitted route; only shown when one exists.

purpose: Billing/subscription management with a Current Plan tab (trial countdown ring, paid/PAYG/expired/locked status cards, transaction history) and an Upgrade tab (edition/tier selector, metered estimate, payment-request drawer for offline manual payments).

features.name: Current plan status display
features.description: Trial-active, paid-active, payment-under-review, expired/locked cards based on status.

features.name: Sync/refresh data
features.description: Re-fetches subscription and reloads invoices.

features.name: Transaction history
features.description: Loads payment-request transactions; responsive table/cards with status.

features.name: Load plans (tiers/PAYG/chain)
features.description: Fetches plans; derives edition tiers, PAYG, custom Chain plan.

features.name: Edition + billing-cycle selector
features.description: RIS / Cloud PACS / RIS+PACS and Monthly/Yearly (10% off); cycle persisted.

features.name: Tier selection
features.description: Tier cards (middle highlighted) showing users/sites/storage/features.

features.name: PAYG / Chain flexible options
features.description: Pay-per-study card selectable; Chain/Enterprise contact-only.

features.name: Metered amount estimate
features.description: Fetches base + storage-overage (or PAYG) estimate.

features.name: Submit payment request (drawer)
features.description: Collects payer/contact/mode/reference/date; submits a planId-authoritative request.

purpose: Landing page at /settings presenting three account-level destinations (Security & PIN, Sync & offline queue, Active sessions) as clickable premium tiles.

features.name: Personalized greeting
features.description: Shows 'Hi {firstName}' from currentUser.

features.name: Security & PIN tile
features.description: Navigates to /settings/security.

features.name: Sync & offline queue tile
features.description: Navigates to /settings/sync.

features.name: Active sessions tile
features.description: Navigates to /settings/sessions.

purpose: Lists all active sessions for the signed-in user across desktop/mobile/tablet categories with a 'This device' badge, IP, sign-in time and last-seen; allows surgical and bulk sign-out.

features.name: Load sessions
features.description: Fetches active sessions and current session id; per-device cards with category, IP, times.

features.name: Refresh
features.description: Reloads the session list.

features.name: Sign out one session
features.description: Revokes a single non-current session (optimistic).

features.name: Sign out everywhere else (bulk)
features.description: Confirms then revokes all except current.

features.name: UTC/IST time handling
features.description: Renders Asia/Kolkata times and relative last-seen.

dialogs: confirm() native dialog for bulk sign-out

purpose: Settings -> Security & PIN: manage the device-local quick-unlock PIN for the current user (set, change with verification, remove) plus a DICOM prefetch-over-cellular preference toggle. PIN stored only on-device, never transmitted.

features.name: PIN status display
features.description: Shows whether a PIN is enabled, with created date, algorithm, iteration count.

features.name: Set PIN
features.description: Two-step enter->confirm 4-digit PIN saved via enrollPin.

features.name: Change PIN
features.description: Verify current PIN then enter->confirm new PIN.

features.name: Remove PIN
features.description: Confirmation then removePin wipes the slot.

features.name: Prefetch-over-cellular preference
features.description: Toggles allowCellular in PrefetchSettings (off by default).

purpose: Settings -> Sync & Outbox: dashboard of the offline architecture - connectivity/pending status, last successful sync, clock skew, per-domain cached row counts, outbox of pending/poisoned mutations (with retry/discard), and the last telemetry events.

features.name: Headline sync status
features.description: Tone-coded card (offline/saving/all-saved) with last sync and clock skew warning >30s.

features.name: Sync now
features.description: Triggers a full sync cycle then reloads; disabled offline.

features.name: Per-domain cached counts
features.description: Counts local Dexie rows per domain (appointments, patients, reports, etc.).

features.name: Outbox list
features.description: Queued mutations with type, time, poisoned/retrying status, last error.

features.name: Retry poisoned (bulk)
features.description: Re-arms all failed items then pushes.

features.name: Discard poisoned (bulk)
features.description: Confirms then purges all poisoned items.

features.name: Retry one item
features.description: Re-arms a single item then pushes.

features.name: Discard one item
features.description: Confirms then removes a single queued item.

features.name: Telemetry tail
features.description: Last ~40 telemetry events with failure-highlighting.

features.name: Minute tick refresh
features.description: Re-renders every 60s for relative timestamps.
